summary: Check if a user can be assigned
description:
Checks if a user has permission to be assigned to an issue in this repository.

If the `assignee` can be assigned to issues in the repository, a `204` header with no content is returned.

Otherwise a `404` status code is returned.

204.description: If the `assignee` can be assigned to issues in the repository, a `204` header with no content is returned.

404.description: Otherwise a `404` status code is returned.
